# Sri Venkateshwara Computers and Digital Studio Videos

Sri Venkateshwara Computers and Digital Studio Videos is a local digital service, banking BC assistance and photo studio centre in Keezhapalur, Ariyalur District, Tamil Nadu, India. The brand is also known as SVC Digital Studios, SVC Digital Studio Videos and Sri Venkateshwara Computers.

Website: https://svcdigitalstudios.in/
Contact: +91 93613 59884
Email: team@svcdigitalstudios.in
Address: No. 155, Prasanth Complex, Old Bus Stand, Trichy Main Road, Keezhapalur, Ariyalur - 621707, Tamil Nadu, India.
Map: https://www.google.com/maps?q=11.0432442,79.0687258&z=18&hl=en

## Main services

- Xerox printout, A4/A3 printing, color print, scanning and lamination
- Money transfer, AEPS cash withdrawal, bill payments, mobile recharge and loan payment assistance
- PayNearby BC, Airtel Payments Bank BC, Spice Money BC and Biznext BC assistance
- Passport photo, ID photo, affidavit photo and studio portrait printing
- Wedding photography, event photography, function video coverage and digital studio videos
- PAN service, government online applications and daily online service assistance
- Flight ticket booking, IRCTC train ticket booking, hotel booking, tour booking and Tirumala Tirupati online darshan booking
- LIC authorised agent support, two-wheeler insurance and motor insurance
- Professional computer courses, Office 365, Photoshop, hardware/networking, website basics and practical AI tools training

## Service areas

Keezhapalur, Keelapalur, Kilapazhuvur, Ariyalur, Thirumanur, Ariyalur District and nearby Tamil Nadu locations.

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@svcdigitalstudios
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61591206504062
